subject: Re: Fwd: For JE
body:
i appreciate it

----- Original Message ----
From: "nadja2102@yahoo.com" <nadja2102@yahoo.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Thursday, June 26, 2008 2:09:46 PM
Subject: Fw: Fwd: For JE



Sent via BlackBerry by AT&T

-----Original Message-----
From: OSSA1@aol.com

Date: Thu, 26 Jun 2008 13:36:32 
To:nadja2102@yahoo.com
Subject: Fwd: For JE


Nadja, 
  
thanks for the follow up, 
  
Please forward to Jeffrey 
  
Anthony




----------------
Gas prices getting you down? Search AOL Autos for fuel-efficient used cars <http://autos.aol.com/used?ncid=aolaut00050000000007> .


-----Inline Message Follows-----

Hi Jeffrey,
 
I just spoke to Nadja who gave me the news.  I would like to see 
you but I understand that you have many important issues to take care of.  
I would just like to say that I will always remember the opportunities you have 
given me and my family and know exactly the caring, thoughtful and generous 
person you are.  I will never forget.  If there is anything you need 
taken care of or any help with anything I am available for you anytime.
 
Best wishes and thoughts 
 
Anthony




________________________________
